mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospital_announcement (dept_id, title, content, publish_date, priority) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{publishDate}, #{priority})
mapper.update: UPDATE hospital_announcement SET dept_id = #{deptId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, priority = #{priority} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_id, title, content, publish_date, priority, created_at FROM hospital_announcement ORDER BY publish_date DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, dept_id, title, content, publish_date, priority, created_at FROM hospital_announcement
AND (dept_id IS NULL OR dept_id = #{departmentId})
AND dept_id IS NULL
AND publish_date >= #{publishDateSince}
ORDER BY publish_date DESC, FIELD(priority, 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW'), id DESC
